title: Civil courts and civil process
summary: 9084 — County Court, High Court, Court of Appeal, and civil procedure overview.
learningObjectives: Outline civil court hierarchy and jurisdiction.
Explain track allocation: small claims, fast, multi.
Describe key stages: claim, defence, trial.
Evaluate access to civil justice reforms.

simpleExplanation.title: Resolving civil disputes
simpleExplanation.summary: Civil claims start in County or High Court depending on value and complexity — tracks determine procedure speed and cost.
steps: High Court — Queen's Bench, Chancery, Family Divisions.

sections.content: **Civil courts** (1.2.1) — map **jurisdiction + tracks** clearly in answers.
